content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Nifty -0.87%, VIX +7.96% to 18.18, Realty -2.36%, PSU Banks -1.83%, Energy -1.34% — clear risk-off tape. Pharma (+0.67%) and IT (+0.29%) the only green pockets, with select FMCG names (TATACONSUM, MARICO, DABUR) outperforming on Q4 earnings. Defensive rotation is real but underneath the surface market breadth is poor; protecting open winners (COFORGE, MARICO, LAURUSLABS) is the priority over chasing new entries late in session.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23850,
      "nifty_resistance": 24100
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1340,
      "new_target": 1500,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Up +9.7% post Q4 blowout (+30% rev, $1.75B order book, Cigniti synergy). Trail SL from 1360 to 1340 — keeps ~3% gap below CMP 1381 (avoids the trail-flush failure mode), still locks in +6.4% on entry 1259. Brokerage targets Rs 1690-2020 support holding for target 1500."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 835,
      "new_target": 870,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Held already at SL 835 (locked breakeven+). CMP 846, gap to SL 1.3% — borderline tight but stored SL unchanged so no-op MODIFY avoided by leaving target same. Actually no change needed — emit HOLD instead."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Correction: SL already at 835 lock-in. CMP 846 gap 1.3% is at the floor of the 1% trail-gap rule. No change. FMCG defensive bid intact."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "VIX +8% and West Asia tensions support gold thesis. -1.2% within SL band 121 (-3.3%). Hold the hedge — research bullish modifier +0.08."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SRF",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+0.5%, FY26 PAT +47%, refrigerant capex doubled to Rs 2,300 cr. SL 2740 (-2%) intact; target 2920 unchanged."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "POLYCAB",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "At 52-w high on 3.3x volume, FY26 PAT +32%, broker targets Rs 9,740-10,500. -0.3% unrealized, SL 8950 intact. Hold for target 9550."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BAJAJ-AUTO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Buyback record May 29 at Rs 12,000 (price floor). -1.5% on auto-weakness day; SL 10440 intact, gap 1.5%. Hold into buyback catalyst."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "DABUR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Q4 PAT +16%, India FMCG +9.5%, mgmt guidance upgrade to low-double-digit FY27. -1.7% within SL 470 (-3.5%) band. Hold for target 510."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "LAURUSLABS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1255,
      "new_target": 1320,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "SL already at 1255 (locked breakeven+2.4%), CMP 1272 gap 1.3% — at floor of trail-gap rule. No-op MODIFY — convert to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "LAURUSLABS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Correction: SL already at 1255 = breakeven+2.4% lock. CMP 1272 gap 1.3%. FY26 PAT +148%, CDMO +36%, ATH. Let it run to 1320."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "TATACONSUM",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Q4 +21% PAT, +8.58% today on the print. +0.3%, SL 1198 (-4%) plenty of room. Hold for target 1330."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "CGPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Order book +61% YoY at Rs 17,107 cr, hit ATH 874.20 May 8. -0.3% unrealized, SL 850 intact. Hold for 920."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "APOLLOHOSP",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Q4 board meeting May 20 — outside 3-session binary window for now. Near 52-w high. SL 7950 intact. Will reassess as event approaches."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+2% today on pharma defensive bid. Q4 mid-May. Halol overhang noted but research neutral, not negative. SL 1830 intact."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "LALPATHLAB",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-1.4%, Q4 PAT -15% YoY a concern but research neutral, sector momentum supportive (peers Thyrocare/Metropolis rallying). SL 1610 (-3.6%) intact. Hold for target 1770."
    },
    {
      "action": "BUY",
      "symbol": "TORNTPHARM",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "quantity": 6,
      "order_type": "LIMIT",
      "price": 4541,
      "stop_loss": 4360,
      "target": 4830,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 8,
      "reasoning": "Pharma sector leader +4.11% today on defensive bid; +39% trailing year vs Nifty Pharma +14.52%. Research BULLISH +0.10. 38% generic semaglutide share. Q4 May 21 = 8 sessions away (outside 3-session binary window, safe entry). Position size: 6×4541 = Rs 27,246 = 2.8% of capital, well below 5% event-trade ceiling. SL 4360 = -4%, target 4830 = +6.4%, R:R 1.6 (verified: 289/181 = 1.60). Healthcare cluster check: LAURUSLABS + SUNPHARMA + LALPATHLAB + APOLLOHOSP already on book (~21% cluster); adding TORNTPHARM ~2.8% = ~24% — within 35% cap, this would be the 2nd new addition to healthcare cluster today... actually no new pharma added today, so this is 1st new admit. OK."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {"symbol": "GOLDBEES", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "VIX spike supports gold hedge thesis"},
    {"symbol": "MARICO", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "SL already at 835 breakeven+, gap to CMP 1.3% — at trail-floor"},
    {"symbol": "COFORGE", "current_action": "TRAIL_SL", "new_stop_loss": 1340, "reasoning": "Trail from 1360→1340 keeps 3% gap below CMP 1381, locks +6.4% on entry"},
    {"symbol": "SRF", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Thesis intact, FY26 PAT +47%, capex catalyst"},
    {"symbol": "POLYCAB", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "52-w high on 3.3x volume, broker upgrades"},
    {"symbol": "BAJAJ-AUTO", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Rs 12,000 buyback floor May 29 anchor"},
    {"symbol": "DABUR", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "FY27 guidance upgrade, Q4 +16%"},
    {"symbol": "LAURUSLABS", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "SL already at 1255 breakeven+, CDMO +36%, ATH"},
    {"symbol": "TATACONSUM", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Q4 +21% PAT, room to SL 1198"},
    {"symbol": "CGPOWER", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Order book +61%, near ATH"},
    {"symbol": "APOLLOHOSP", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Q4 May 20 outside 3-session window; will revisit closer to event"},
    {"symbol": "SUNPHARMA", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Pharma defensive bid, +2% today"},
    {"symbol": "LALPATHLAB", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Sector momentum supportive despite weaker Q4 print"}
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "BULLISH candidates considered for new entries and dispositions: (1) TORNTPHARM (+0.10) — ADMITTED above. (2) TATACONSUM — already have OPEN LIMIT BUY @ 1240 from earlier, no stacking; CMP 1250 above limit, may not fill today. (3) DABUR (+0.07) — already held, not re-added. (4) COFORGE (+0.09) — already held, max-sized. (5) POLYCAB (+0.06), MARICO (+0.06), SRF (+0.06), CGPOWER (+0.07), APOLLOHOSP (+0.06), BAJAJ-AUTO (+0.05/+0.10), GOLDBEES (+0.08) — all already held. (6) LAURUSLABS (+0.12) — already held. (7) KOTAKBANK neutral +0.03 — passed, weak banking tape. (8) SUNPHARMA, LALPATHLAB, TATACONSUM neutral — already held or near-held. Watchlist nearly fully expressed in book; admit funnel narrow today by design.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Deployed 52% → adding TORNTPHARM ~2.8% brings to ~55%, still well below 80% soft target. Risk-off macro (VIX +8%, broad selloff) justifies measured admit pace — only 1 new BUY despite watchlist breadth. Healthcare/pharma cluster after addition: LAURUS+SUN+LALPATH+APOLLO+TORNTPHARM ≈ 24% — under 35% cap. Pending HFCL MIS LIMIT 7763min old (5+ days stale) is a concern but engine should have auto-cancelled — flagging for review. Stale TATACONSUM CNC LIMIT @ 1240 placed 418m ago — CMP 1250 above limit, position already filled at avg 1248 from prior fill, leaving the OPEN order in place (may fill on intraday dip). Daily P&L -2.47% within 7.5% loss limit. Win rate 5-day at 12% with 0.3 profit factor is the concerning metric — average loss 2.4x average win signals exits being taken too tight and entries too speculative. Trail-SL discipline (1% floor below CMP) being respected this tick — prior trail-flush failures avoided."
}
